description: Unified marketing + ecommerce reporting across FB, GA4, Shopify, CM360 and other platforms

platforms.name: facebook_ads
platforms.notes: Primary source for paid social metrics

platforms.name: ga4
platforms.notes: Fallback web analytics when CM360 not used

datasets.description: Compact template-driven schema inferred from sample export.
Campaign manager platform basically used for managing all campaigns across multiple platforms.
Compact schema inferred from Snapchat export sheet 'Sheet1'
Compact schema inferred from TikTok export sheet 'Sheet1'
Compact schema inferred from The Trade Desk export sheet 'Sheet1'
Compact schema inferred from TrueView export sheet 'Sheet1'
Compact schema inferred from Google Search Ads export sheet 'Sheet1'

column_alias_library.description: Total media investment in local currency.
Total click actions (Snapchat 'swipes' treated as clicks).
Lead actions captured via platform lead gen.
Conversion events as defined per platform.
Ad set / ad group / line item label.
Reporting date (start/end included for platform exports).

join_policies.name: delivery_union_monthly
join_policies.description: Aggregate each platform separately to month, then UNION ALL into a single delivery set. Never join platforms to each other.

join_policies.name: cm360_conversions_monthly
join_policies.description: Monthly conversions-only aggregation from CM360. CM360 is conversion source of truth.

join_policies.name: delivery_to_conversions_join
join_policies.description: Only join the unioned delivery CTE to CM360 conversions by normalized names and site.

safe_division_patterns.ctr: CASE WHEN SUM(impressions)=0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(clicks)/SUM(impressions) END
safe_division_patterns.cpc: CASE WHEN SUM(clicks)=0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(cost)/SUM(clicks) END
safe_division_patterns.cvr: CASE WHEN SUM(clicks)=0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(conversions)/SUM(clicks) END
safe_division_patterns.cpa: CASE WHEN SUM(conversions)=0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(cost)/SUM(conversions) END

join_policies.name: final_performance_select
join_policies.description: Produce monthly performance with required column order and safe metric calculations.
